reply: I am Camtrop Assistant, developed by Camtrop – Explore Like a Local. The founder is Amit Ranjan Kuiry. 🙏
Camtrop is a travel platform built for West Bengal tourism. It helps you book guided tours, explore local places, find stays, and plan your trip budget — all in one app. 🌿
Hello! 👋 I'm Camtrop Assistant. Ask me about hotels, local food, tourist spots, travel tips, or anything about your trip!
I'm doing great, ready to help you explore! 🗺️ What would you like to know about your destination?
You're welcome! 😊 Feel free to ask anything else about your trip.

🏨 For stays, tap 'Stay Nearby' on the home screen — it shows hotels, guesthouses and resorts near your current location with ratings and distance. Budget options start around ₹500/night in most districts.
🍛 West Bengal is famous for Macher Jhol (fish curry), Kosha Mangsho, Luchi-Alur Torkari, Mishti Doi, and Sandesh. Look for small local dhabas near tourist spots for the most authentic taste!

🗺️ Tap 'Explore Around' to see tourist spots near you. West Bengal has amazing destinations: Darjeeling, Sundarbans, Bishnupur, Murshidabad, Purulia, and the Dooars. Each district has hidden gems too!

💰 Tap 'Plan Budget' for a smart trip cost estimator. Budget travel in WB costs ₹800–1500/day (stay + food). Mid-range is ₹1500–3000/day. Book vehicles through Camtrop to get transparent fixed pricing — no hidden charges!

🚗 You can book vehicles (bike, auto, non-AC car, AC car, 7-seater) directly through the Camtrop booking screen. For long distances, trains from Howrah/Sealdah connect most districts. Local autos and e-rickshaws are great for short hops within towns.

🧭 Camtrop connects you with local CAMTROP HEROES — verified guides who know every corner of their district. Book a guide from the booking screen and they'll escort you through the best spots, share stories, and handle logistics for you.

🌤️ West Bengal has a tropical climate. Best time to visit most districts is October–March (cool and dry). Avoid June–September for hill trips. Sundarbans is best in winter. The home screen shows live weather for your current location!
🛡️ West Bengal is generally safe for tourists. Police helpline: 100. Tourist helpline: 1800-345-6185 (toll free). Always share your itinerary with someone you trust before starting a trip.

📸 Best photo spots in WB: Tiger Hill sunrise (Darjeeling), Sundarbans mangrove reflections, Bishnupur terracotta temples, Murshidabad Hazarduari, and the rolling tea gardens of Dooars. Golden hour (6–7am and 5–6pm) gives the best light!

📅 Best time to visit West Bengal:
• Hills (Darjeeling, Kalimpong): Mar–May, Sep–Nov
• Sundarbans: Nov–Feb
• Purulia, Bishnupur: Oct–Mar
• Dooars & forests: Nov–Apr
Avoid peak monsoon (Jul–Aug) for most outdoor trips.
🌄 Purulia is known for its red laterite landscape, Chhau dance, Ajodhya Hills, Baranti Lake, and Turga Dam. Best visited Oct–Feb. Local Sal and Palash forests are stunning in spring!

🏔️ Darjeeling offers Tiger Hill sunrise, Batasia Loop toy train, Padmaja Naidu Zoo, tea garden walks, and stunning Kanchenjunga views. The toy train (Darjeeling Himalayan Railway) is a UNESCO World Heritage site!

🐯 Sundarbans is the world's largest mangrove delta and home to the Royal Bengal Tiger. Visit Sajnekhali, Sudhanyakhali, and Dobanki watchtower. Best time: Nov–Feb. Boat safaris are the main way to explore!

🏛️ Murshidabad is the former capital of Bengal Nawabs. Visit Hazarduari Palace (1000 doors!), Katra Mosque, Nashipur Rajbari, and the silk weaving villages. A 2-day trip is ideal. History buffs will love it!

🏯 Bishnupur is famous for its beautiful 17th-century terracotta temples — Rasmancha, Jorbangla, Shyamrai. Also known for Baluchari silk sarees and Bishnupur Gharana classical music. A must-visit in Bankura district!

🐘 The Dooars is a lush forest region in North Bengal with tea gardens, rivers, and wildlife parks. Gorumara, Chapramari, and Jaldapara are home to rhinos and elephants. Best visited Nov–April. Perfect for nature lovers!

🌆 Kolkata is the cultural capital of India! Must-visit: Victoria Memorial, Howrah Bridge, Dakshineswar Temple, College Street, Park Street food lane, Kumartuli (idol makers), and the Maidan. A city of joy and heritage!
💳 Camtrop currently uses cash payment — you pay directly to your CAMTROP HERO after the trip ends. You can also apply discount coupons at checkout to save on your booking!

📋 To book a trip:
1. Tap 'Book Service' from the home screen
2. Select your district, pickup & drop points
3. Choose tour places and vehicle
4. Fill your name, phone & travel date
5. Swipe to confirm — a CAMTROP HERO will accept your request!
🎟️ You can apply coupon codes at the booking confirmation screen. Tap 'Apply Coupon' to see available offers. Follow Camtrop on social media for the latest discount codes!

✨ I can help you with:
• Finding hotels & stays nearby
• Discovering tourist spots
• Local food recommendations
• Travel budget planning
• History & stories of places
• Booking tips & guidance
Just ask me anything about your trip! 🗺️

🎭 West Bengal has a rich cultural heritage! Baul music (UNESCO intangible heritage), Chhau dance (Purulia), Durga Puja (world's biggest festival), Rabindra Sangeet, and Jatra (folk theatre) are iconic. Every district has its own unique traditions!

🆘 Emergency numbers in West Bengal:
• Police: 100
• Ambulance: 102
• Fire: 101
• Tourist helpline: 1800-345-6185
• Women helpline: 1091
Stay safe and share your location with family!

📖 Tap 'Know the Story' on the home screen to discover the rich history of West Bengal — from ancient kingdoms to Nawabs, British Raj, freedom fighters, and modern Bengal. Each district has fascinating stories!

📶 Most tourist towns in WB have decent 4G coverage (Jio, Airtel, Vi). In remote forests and hills, connectivity can be weak. Download offline maps (Google Maps) before heading to Sundarbans or remote Dooars areas. Free WiFi is available at major hotels.

🗣️ Bengali (Bangla) is the primary language in West Bengal. Hindi and English are widely understood in tourist areas. A few common Bengali phrases:
• হ্যালো = Hello
• ধন্যবাদ = Thank you
• কত টাকা? = How much?
• কোথায়? = Where?

🪔 Durga Puja is West Bengal's biggest festival — listed as UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage! Kolkata transforms into an open-air art gallery with thousands of pandals. Best time: October. Biswa Bangla Gate and College Square pandals are iconic. Book hotels 2–3 months in advance during Puja!

🌸 Shantiniketan in Birbhum district is Rabindranath Tagore's dream town. Visit Visva-Bharati University, Tagore's house (Uttarayan), and the famous Poush Mela fair in December. The open-air classrooms and red-soil landscape are truly unique. Just 2.5 hrs from Kolkata by train!

🏰 Cooch Behar is home to the magnificent Cooch Behar Palace (Rajbari) — inspired by Buckingham Palace! Also visit Madan Mohan Temple and Sagar Dighi lake. A perfect stop on your North Bengal itinerary. Best visited Oct–March.

🌺 Kalimpong is a charming hill town near Darjeeling famous for its flower nurseries, Buddhist monasteries, and stunning Teesta river views. Visit Zang Dhok Palri monastery, Deolo Hill, and the Saturday haat market. Quieter and less crowded than Darjeeling!

🌊 Digha is West Bengal's most popular beach destination, just 180 km from Kolkata. The beach is wide and shallow — great for families. Mandarmani (nearby) is famous for its uninterrupted 13 km beach drive. Best visited Oct–March. Avoid monsoon season.

♿ Many major tourist spots in WB are becoming more accessible. Victoria Memorial, Eco Park (Kolkata), and Bishnupur temples have ramps. For senior citizens, Camtrop can arrange AC cars with patient drivers. Always mention accessibility needs while booking so your HERO can plan accordingly!

🚶 West Bengal is generally safe for solo travellers including women. Popular safe destinations: Shantiniketan, Bishnupur, Darjeeling, and Kolkata. Travel during daylight hours in remote areas. Always inform someone of your itinerary. Camtrop's verified HEROES make solo travel much safer and easier!

💑 West Bengal has beautiful romantic destinations! Top honeymoon spots:
• Darjeeling — misty hills & tea gardens
• Mandarmani — sunset beach walks
• Shantiniketan — peaceful & artistic
• Dooars — forest resorts & nature
• Mirik — quiet lakeside town
Camtrop can arrange private guided tours for couples!

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 West Bengal is perfect for family trips! Kid-friendly spots:
• Darjeeling toy train ride 🚂
• Eco Park Kolkata (boat rides, butterfly garden)
• Alipore Zoo, Kolkata
• Science City, Kolkata
• Digha beach
• Jaldapara (elephant safari)
Camtrop's 7-seater vehicle option is perfect for families!

🚂 West Bengal has excellent rail connectivity. Key stations:
• Howrah Junction — India's busiest
• Sealdah — connects East Bengal routes
• NJP (New Jalpaiguri) — gateway to North Bengal & Darjeeling
• Bolpur — for Shantiniketan
Book trains on IRCTC app. Camtrop picks you up from any station!

✈️ West Bengal has 3 main airports:
• Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Int'l (Kolkata) — major hub
• Bagdogra (Siliguri) — gateway to Darjeeling & Dooars
• Kazi Nazrul Islam Airport (Durgapur) — central WB
Camtrop can arrange pickup from any airport — just mention it while booking!

🎒 Packing tips for West Bengal travel:
• Light cottons for summer & plains
• Warm layers for hills (Darjeeling) even in summer
• Raincoat/umbrella for monsoon
• Comfortable walking shoes
• Sunscreen & mosquito repellent for Sundarbans
• Power bank (remote areas have less power)
• Small cash (₹500 notes) for rural areas

🦸 CAMTROP HEROES are verified local guides and drivers from each district. They:
• Know every local shortcut & hidden spot
• Speak Bengali, Hindi & basic English
• Are background-verified by Camtrop
• Handle all logistics so you just enjoy
• Share local stories & culture
They are the heart of every Camtrop trip!

❌ To cancel a booking, go to 'My Bookings' in the app and tap 'Cancel'. Since Camtrop uses cash payment, there is no online refund process — cancellations are free as long as you cancel before your HERO accepts the request. After acceptance, please inform your HERO directly. Be considerate — they plan their day around your booking! 🙏

⭐ After your trip, please rate your CAMTROP HERO in the app! Your review helps other travellers choose the best guides and motivates our heroes to keep delivering great service. Honest feedback — good or bad — helps us improve. Thank you for being part of the Camtrop family! 🙏
